info.name: Pioneer DDJ-T1
info.author: Michiel W. Beijen
info.description: Core MIDI mapping for the Pioneer DDJ-T1 (originally bundled with Traktor LE). Covers transport, 4-channel mixer (volume/EQ/filter/trim), crossfader, pitch faders, jog wheels (scratch + pitch bend), headphone cue, browse and load.

control.description: BROWSE knob - push - toggle focus between tree and tracklist
LOAD - load selected track into Deck 1 (A)
LOAD - load selected track into Deck 2 (B)
Jog wheel touch (top platter) - Deck A
Jog wheel touch (top platter) - Deck B
Jog wheel rotation (top, scratch) - Deck A
Jog wheel rotation (top, scratch) - Deck B
Jog wheel rotation (side, pitch bend) - Deck A
Jog wheel rotation (side, pitch bend) - Deck B
Filter knob push - toggle filter enabled - Deck A
Filter knob push - toggle filter enabled - Deck B
